## Type of Change

<!-- What type of change does this PR introduce? Please check the options that apply. -->

- [ ] `fix` (Bug fix - non-breaking change)
- [ ] `feat` (New feature or peripheral driver - non-breaking change)
- [ ] `docs` (Documentation or API comments update)
- [ ] `refactor` (Code refactoring with no functional change)
- [ ] `perf` (Performance optimization or footprint reduction)
- [ ] `test` (Adding or updating tests)
- [ ] `chore` (Build system, configuration, or dependency updates)
- [ ] **Breaking Change** (Fix or feature that would cause existing functionality/APIs to change)

## Pre-submission Checklist

Please ensure all of the following items are completed before submitting your PR:

- [ ] **Coding Style**: My code strictly follows the project's coding style (Linux kernel style, 4-space indentation, no tabs).
- [ ] **Zero Warnings**: I have compiled the code locally and confirmed there are **zero errors and zero compiler warnings**.
- [ ] **DCO Sign-off**: Every commit in this PR is signed off using the `-s` flag (`Signed-off-by: Name <email>`) as required by `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] **MPL-2.0 Compliance**: I have verified that any additions or modifications to MPL-protected files remain strictly under the MPL-2.0 license terms.
- [ ] **Documentation**: I have added/updated descriptive Doxygen comments for new functions, or updated external documentation (README, API docs, etc.).
- [ ] **Testing**: I have added necessary test cases, and all new/existing tests pass successfully.
- [ ] **Branch Sync**: I have rebased or merged the latest changes from the `main` branch into my feature branch.
- [ ] **Clean Git History**: My commit messages follow the Conventional Commits specification, and I have avoided unnecessary formatting changes or noisy commits.
